results.notes: Multi-ability: ETB filter for nontoken artifact entries creates Munitions token. Functional (token leaves-battlefield damage trigger separate).

notes: All 54 orphans wired. Stub-bodied orphans (those with `return []` placeholders) were still wired so the trigger registers with the engine; the empty effect is consistent with how Phase 2 already handled stubs (e.g. mouth_of_the_storm_setup, melded_moxite_setup). The `engine_gap` field on each wired-but-stubbed entry summarizes what the engine would need to make the effect functional. Most gaps are: (1) interactive target selection from hand/battlefield/graveyard, (2) temporary P/T modification (`+X/+0 until end of turn`), (3) temporary keyword grant (deathtouch/first strike until EOT). Two `unknown_helper` flags (make_tap_trigger, make_end_step_trigger) were spurious — both helpers exist in interceptor_helpers.py and were re-imported in this file.
